# Amit Dalal

> Global DevOps / Cloud / Platform Engineer — remote-first across time zones,
> currently based in India. Amit automates infrastructure, runs Kubernetes on AWS
> and GCP, builds CI/CD pipelines, and ships open-source operations tooling.
> Personal site and résumé: https://amitdalal.com

## About

Amit Dalal is a DevOps and Cloud engineer who works with teams across the globe,
currently based in India (IST). His work centres on:
- Designing and operating Kubernetes clusters (Amazon EKS and self-managed).
- Infrastructure as code with Terraform and Ansible.
- CI/CD automation with GitHub Actions and GitLab CI.
- Reliability and observability with Zabbix and Graylog.
- Edge and security hardening with Cloudflare, nginx, SSH, and TLS.
- Languages and tooling: Python, Bash, Docker, Helm, Git, MCP.

He maintains a public Helm chart repository at https://charts.amitdalal.com and
publishes open-source tools on GitHub at https://github.com/amitsdalal.

## Projects

- [sessender](https://pypi.org/project/sessender/): Python package on PyPI for sending email through Amazon SES (plain text, HTML, attachments).
- [Helm Charts](https://charts.amitdalal.com): Maintained Kubernetes Helm chart repository.
- [imapsync](https://github.com/amitsdalal/imapsync): imapsync packaged as a Dockerised micro-service for IMAP mailbox migrations.
- [FlareOps](https://github.com/amitsdalal/FlareOps): Command-line scripts for automating Cloudflare operations.
- [ssh-key](https://github.com/amitsdalal/ssh-key): Python utility to generate and provision SSH keys.
- [openssh-9-centos-7](https://github.com/amitsdalal/openssh-9-centos-7): Build modern OpenSSH 9 on legacy CentOS 7.

## Contact

- Email: ping@amitdalal.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/amitsdalal
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/amitsdalal

## Availability

Takes on a limited number of consulting and advisory engagements with teams
worldwide — infrastructure reviews, cloud and Kubernetes architecture, CI/CD
pipelines, and reliability. Reach out to discuss a project or collaboration.
